title: Nagoya, Aichi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nagoya, Aichi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nagoya is a city in Aichi with a population of 2,332,000. Japan’s fourth-largest city and industrial heartland, home to Toyota, with a magnificent castle and vibrant food culture.
